title: Alfred Webre
summary: The exopolitics author who joins the May 2020 interview.
markdown:
**Alfred Lambremont Webre** is a guest in the May 11, 2020 interview — the sixth of the
[Operation Lusterkill](/lore/operation-lusterkill/) sessions. He is known publicly as a
founder of the field of **exopolitics** and the author of books on the "Omniverse" and on the
positive-future hypothesis.

In the session Webre appears alongside Kosol Ouch and James Rink as the conversation turns to
the pandemic, timelines, and humanity's place among extraterrestrial civilizations. His
presence brings an exopolitics framing to the archive's [first-contact](/lore/first-contact/)
and [interstellar-alliance](/lore/interstellar-alliance/) themes.

Webre is one of several public figures who take part in the archive's interview strand,
questioning Unimetrix 1 directly from their own bodies of work.
